summary: Frontend-only testing completed. Calculator form, tariff calculation, NPF vs ZLECAf comparison tables, pie charts, and Formalités section all working correctly with good text contrast on dark theme.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calculator tested with Algeria (DZA) → Senegal (SEN), HS code 090111 (coffee), value 50000 USD. All UI elements have good contrast on dark theme.

calculator_form.details: Country selects (ISO3 codes), HS code smart search, value input all working. Use 'Utiliser ce code' button to select HS code before clicking Calculate.

tariff_calculation.details: API returns results with authentic data badge, showing 4 taxes for Senegal: D.D 20%, RS 1%, PCS 1%, T.V.A 18%

npf_vs_zlecaf_tables.details: Side-by-side comparison tables showing NPF ($70,800) vs ZLECAf ($59,000) with D.D exemption highlighted

pie_charts.details: Tax distribution pie charts for both regimes with colored segments (D.D red, T.V.A yellow, RS/PCS blue) and percentage labels

formalities_section.details: Complete documents section with 5 mandatory documents and 2 ZLECAf-specific documents (Certificate of Origin, Supplier Declaration)

text_contrast.details: All text readable - White (#F5F5F5) on dark bg (#1B232C), Gold (#D4AF37) titles, Green (#10b981) for ZLECAf, Red (#EF4444) for NPF
